title: Chase the Skies Panorama
description: The lone ghast cries no longer, and no longer is it lonely. That is if you adopt him to your main menu... and you will. Won't you?
body:
# Chase The Skies! And the ghasts.
The lone ghast cries no longer, and no longer is it lonely.

That is if you adopt him to your main menu... and you will. Won't you?

![Chase the Skies Panorama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6a1e0f679866731bda43f7623ed0456283e5f79.webp)

# Features
- Single prerendered panorama of flying ghast scene for your main menu

# Not your cup of tea?
Feel free to check out [other panoramas](https://modrinth.com/user/Lumora) that I made for you!
